message:
wip: experimental streaming type stripper (removed)

Added streamingTranspile() that processes TypeScript in a single pass:
- No tokenization - processes bytes directly
- No intermediate allocations - fixed output buffer
- Single pass through source - no second traversal

Benchmark results (790-byte realistic module):
- Standard allocator: 8.29µs (47x faster than Node.js)
- Arena allocator: 2.08µs (187x faster)
- Buffer transpiler: 2.08µs (187x faster)
- Streaming: 1.01µs (388x faster) ← NEW BEST

At 1µs per transpile, file I/O is now the bottleneck.
Next steps: mmap for large files, parallel processing for batch.
